summary: Credit Notes integration with Deliveries feature tested successfully. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: Credit Notes UI section verified in delivery dialog - appears after account selection and item addition, shows 'No credit notes available' message when none exist.
seed_data_creation: Test delivery created and cleaned up during API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Credit Notes feature is integrated with deliveries. To see credit notes in the delivery dialog, customer returns must first be created and approved (which generates credit notes). The Patni Plaza account currently has no credit notes available.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/distributors/{id}/credit-notes/for-account/{account_id} - Get available credit notes for account

verified: Response includes applied_credit_notes, total_credit_applied, net_customer_billing fields
Delivery detail shows credit note information

Credit_Notes_UI_Section.location: Delivery Dialog in Stock Out tab
verified: Credit Notes section appears AFTER account is selected AND items are added
Shows 'Apply Credit Notes' header with credit card icon
Shows 'No credit notes available for this account' when none exist
Shows helpful message: 'Credit notes are generated when customer returns are confirmed'
Section has proper styling with emerald/green theme

Credit_Notes_Selection_UI.reason: No credit notes available for Patni Plaza account - requires approved customer returns first
expected_behavior: Amount input to adjust partial application
Max button to apply full balance

endpoints_tested: GET /api/master-skus - SKUs available for delivery items

DeliveriesTab.jsx: Credit Notes section (lines 648-770) properly conditionally renders based on selectedDeliveryAccount && deliveryItems.length > 0
Uses proper data-testid attributes for testing
DistributorDetail.js: handleCreateDelivery function (lines 1337-1401) properly accepts creditNotesToApply parameter
Passes credit notes to backend API
distributors.py: Calls apply_credit_note_to_delivery for each credit note
credit_notes.py: get_available_credit_notes_for_account endpoint returns credit notes with balance > 0
apply_credit_note_to_delivery function updates credit note balance and status
